title: henckelia codonion
intro: Henckelia codonion, also known as the Indian pipe plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Henckelia codonion include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Henckelia codonion can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
